seo.title: Building AI Coding Assistant with Haystack + Vex Guardrails
seo.description: Learn how to build ai coding assistant with Haystack + Vex guardrails. Detect failures, prevent drift, and ensure reliability.

content.intro: Building an AI Coding Assistant with Haystack enables a powerful code-aware LLM agent that processes repository context, executes code in sandboxes, validates tests, and iteratively debugs issues. Guardrails are essential to prevent pipeline failures like type mismatches, irrelevant retrievals, hallucinations, and silent errors that could lead to incorrect code suggestions or security vulnerabilities. Vex integration ensures reliability through verification of code correctness, security, and compliance in production deployments.

architectureOverview.heading: AI Coding Assistant Architecture with Haystack
architectureOverview.description:
The architecture starts with a Retriever component that fetches relevant code files and documentation from a repository index based on user queries. These documents feed into a PromptBuilder that constructs context-aware prompts for the LLM Generator, which produces code solutions. A SandboxExecutor runs the generated code in isolation, followed by a TestValidator that checks outputs against unit tests and expected behaviors. An IterativeDebugger loops back if issues are detected, refining prompts with error feedback.

Haystack pipelines orchestrate these components modularly, allowing easy insertion of Vex as a custom verification node after generation and execution. This ensures medium-risk scenarios like security scanning and license checks are enforced before final output. The pipeline handles failures gracefully with retry logic and fallback prompts.
architectureOverview.diagram:
User Query
    |
    v
[Retriever] --> [PromptBuilder] --> [LLM Generator] --> [Vex Verifier]
    ^                                           |             |
    |                                           v             v
[Repo Index]                            [SandboxExecutor] [TestValidator]
                                                  |             |
                                                  v             |
                                           [IterativeDebugger] <--|
                                                             Fail/Retry

risks.name: Pipeline component output type mismatches
risks.description: Retriever outputs non-text documents or Generator returns malformed JSON, breaking downstream SandboxExecutor.
risks.mitigation: Vex schema validation enforces strict typing between components.

risks.name: Retriever returning irrelevant documents
risks.description: Poor embeddings lead to unrelated code snippets, causing hallucinated or incorrect solutions.
risks.mitigation: Vex relevance scoring filters documents before prompt construction.

risks.name: Generator hallucinating beyond retrieved context
risks.description: LLM invents APIs or logic not present in repo context, leading to runtime failures.
risks.mitigation: Vex context faithfulness checks against retrieved documents.

risks.name: Custom component errors silently swallowed
risks.description: SandboxExecutor or TestValidator crashes without propagating errors to user.
risks.mitigation: Vex error monitoring and structured logging in pipeline.

implementation.title: Basic Retrieval-Augmented Pipeline
implementation.description: Core Haystack pipeline for retrieving repo context and generating code suggestions.
implementation.code:
from haystack import Pipeline
from haystack.components.retrievers.in_memory import InMemoryEmbeddingRetriever
from haystack.components.generators import OpenAIGenerator
from haystack.utils import ComponentDevice

retriever = InMemoryEmbeddingRetriever(document_store=repo_index, embedder=code_embedder)
generator = OpenAIGenerator(model='gpt-4o')

code_assist_pipe = Pipeline()
code_assist_pipe.add_component('retriever', retriever)
code_assist_pipe.add_component('generator', generator)
code_assist_pipe.connect('retriever', 'generator')

result = code_assist_pipe.run({'retriever': {'query': 'fix this bug in auth.py'}, 'generator': {'prompt': 'Write fix: {{query}}\nContext: {{documents}}'}})

implementation.title: Sandbox Code Execution Component
implementation.description: Custom component to safely execute generated code and capture outputs/errors.

implementation.title: Test Validation Component
implementation.description: Validates generated code against predefined unit tests from the repository.

implementation.title: Iterative Debugging Loop
implementation.description: Pipeline with conditional branching for iterative refinement based on test failures.
implementation.code:
from haystack import Pipeline
from haystack.components.builders import PromptBuilder

debug_pipe = Pipeline()
debug_pipe.add_component('prompt', PromptBuilder(template=debug_template))
debug_pipe.add_component('generator', generator)
debug_pipe.add_component('sandbox', sandbox)
debug_pipe.add_component('validator', test_validator)

debug_pipe.connect('prompt', 'generator')
debug_pipe.connect('generator', 'sandbox')
debug_pipe.connect('sandbox', 'validator')

# Conditional retry on failure
result = debug_pipe.run({'prompt': {'query': bug_query, 'context': repo_docs}})
if not result['validator']['passed']:
    retry_prompt = f"Fix errors: {result['validator']['failures']}"

vexIntegration.title: Vex Custom Verifier Component
vexIntegration.description: Add Vex as pipeline component for comprehensive verification after code generation.

vexIntegration.title: Risk-Profiled Pipeline with Vex
vexIntegration.description: Medium-risk profile configuration with Vex blocking on critical issues.

vexIntegration.title: Full Pipeline with Vex Integration
vexIntegration.description: Complete AI Coding Assistant pipeline integrating all components with Vex guardrails.
vexIntegration.code:
full_pipeline = Pipeline()
full_pipeline.add_component('retriever', retriever)
full_pipeline.add_component('prompt', prompt_builder)
full_pipeline.add_component('generator', generator)
full_pipeline.add_component('vex', vex_verifier)
full_pipeline.add_component('sandbox', sandbox)
full_pipeline.add_component('validator', test_validator)

full_pipeline.connect('retriever', 'prompt')
full_pipeline.connect('prompt', 'generator')
full_pipeline.connect('generator', 'vex')
full_pipeline.connect('vex', 'sandbox')
full_pipeline.connect('sandbox', 'validator')

# Run with Vex safety net
result = full_pipeline.run({
    'retriever': {'query': 'Implement user auth endpoint'},
    'prompt': {'template': code_prompt}
})

if result['vex']['verified']:
    print('Safe code ready:', result['generator']['replies'][0])
